release_notes: Probe spawn UNKNOWN fixed: chrome stdout/stderr now go to file descriptors instead of pipes (Windows GUI subsystem libuv quirk). Launcher self-update progress is now fully Russian: phase labels (verifying/extracting/preparing/applying), speed (МБ/с, КБ/с), ETA (ч/мин/с), size row (МБ). Saved-badge in custom binary settings auto-dismisses after 2.5s. Probe error messages localize spawn UNKNOWN as a friendly 'couldn't start Chrome' hint.
